title: Perps core trading-lifecycle verification (headless, no UI)
description: Runs the perps-controller HyperLiquid trading-lifecycle e2e (open + close a BTC position) and packages its result as Recipe v1 evidence. No UI. REQUIRES HL_E2E_PRIVATE_KEY pointing at a funded HyperLiquid testnet wallet.

proofTargets.claim: perps-controller can open and close a BTC position end-to-end
